test.name: CT-025 Validar Botão de Acessibilidade em Todas as Telas

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ENTER to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a area de trabalho
Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class,'font-extrabold') and contains(.,'Área de trabalho')]' contains exact text 'Área de trabalho'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Quando acesso o projeto Learn 360 via teclado
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.msg: Pressing special key TAB to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina dos projetos
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: E acesso o curso Fundamentos do ESG via teclado
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ENTER to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Entao sou direcionado para a pagina do curso
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class,'font-extrabold') and contains(.,'Fundamentos do ESG')]' contains exact text 'Awtra 2025.33_Fundamentos do ESG (Liderança) (Cópia)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Quando clico no botao Previa via teclado
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key ENTER to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select Frame
kw.doc: Sets frame identified by ``locator`` as the current frame.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: E aciono o botao Desbloquear via teclado
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Set Focus To Element
kw.doc: Sets the focus to the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Pressing special key ENTER to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Pressing special key TAB to browser.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Sair') or contains(.,'Logout')]' not visible after 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'Sair') or contains(.,'Logout')]' not visible after 5 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Click Element

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
